summary: The protagonist, Kang Hyunwoo (known as Melee-God), returns to the game 'Arena' after a long absence, swiftly passing a Level 10 tutorial and receiving a unique item. He reconnects with Youngchan and reveals his plan to recreate a highly valuable 'EXP Potion,' for which he needs a rare ingredient. His attempt to acquire this ingredient is thwarted by the Black Skull Guild, whose members block his entry to a dungeon. This confrontation escalates rapidly, leading Hyunwoo to accept a high-stakes 'character deletion bet' against a Black Skull Guild member named Park Jonwoo.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo, also known as Melee-God, returns to 'Arena' and effortlessly completes a Level 10 tutorial, earning a unique ring.
Hyunwoo outlines his strategy to recreate the valuable 'EXP Potion,' a formula he alone knows, but requires a specific ingredient for its synthesis.
Blocked from entering a dungeon by the Black Skull Guild, Hyunwoo enters a 'character deletion bet' duel with one of their members, Park Jonwoo.
